Package org.eventb.internal.ui

Class OverlayIcon

java.lang.Object
org.eclipse.jface.resource.DeviceResourceDescriptor<org.eclipse.swt.graphics.Image>
org.eclipse.jface.resource.ImageDescriptor
org.eclipse.jface.resource.CompositeImageDescriptor
org.eventb.internal.ui.OverlayIcon
@Deprecated public class OverlayIcon extends org.eclipse.jface.resource.CompositeImageDescriptor
Deprecated.
Use instead org.eclipse.jface.viewers.DecorationOverlayIcon
An OverlayIcon consists of a main icon and several adornments.
